title: onobrychis maassoumii
intro: Onobrychis maassoumii, also known as Maassoum's bird's-foot trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onobrychis maassoumii are numerous, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis maassoumii include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
